name: proc_creation_win_gpg4win_portable_execution
raw_query: any where ((process.executable like~ ("*\\gpg.exe", "*\\gpg2.exe")) or process.pe.original_file_name:"gpg.exe" or process.pe.description:"GnuPG’s OpenPGP tool") and (not (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\GNU\\GnuPG\\bin\\*", "*:\\Program Files (x86)\\GnuPG VS-Desktop\\*", "*:\\Program Files (x86)\\GnuPG\\bin\\*", "*:\\Program Files (x86)\\Gpg4win\\bin\\*")))
